_comment: Committed template — copy to config.json for local staging. Live config.json and publish-state.json are gitignored.

_fieldDocs.siteUrl: Public URL of this MonMS instance, no trailing slash. Shown in the serve startup banner (Site, Admin, Publish links). Example: https://staging.example.com
_fieldDocs.productionUrl: HTTPS origin of the live production site, no trailing slash. Used by Publish to live and by monms content publish when --to is omitted — not the running instance URL.
_fieldDocs.publisherEmails: PocketBase superuser emails allowed to open /_monms/publish. Create users at /_/ first, then list their emails here.
_fieldDocs.allowedHosts: Hostnames passed to monms serve as --origins when the CLI flag is omitted. CLI --origins always wins. Example: staging.example.com
_fieldDocs.bind: Listen address for monms serve as --http when the CLI flag is omitted. CLI --http always wins. Example: { "host": "0.0.0.0", "port": "8090" }
_fieldDocs.logging: Optional. File log levels under .monms/logs/. Omit to use build-mode defaults (production binary: error, warn, schema; development binary: all levels). ERROR is always written. Values: error, warn, info, debug, schema.
_fieldDocs.loggingRotation: Optional lumberjack rotation for log files. Example: { "maxSizeMB": 10, "maxBackups": 5, "maxAgeDays": 30, "compress": true }
_fieldDocs.devLogging: Not stored in config.json. Verbose PocketBase console/SQL logs: run monms serve --dev (CLI flag only).
_fieldDocs.mcp: Optional MCP HTTP listener for agentic access. Keys in monms_api_keys; restart monms after bind changes. Example: { "enabled": false, "host": "127.0.0.1", "port": "8091", "allowNonSuperuserKeys": false }
_fieldDocs.cache: Optional response caches (off by default). template.enabled caches parsed .gohtml; html.enabled caches rendered GET pages to disk and optional memory LRU. html.memoryCompress: opt-in zstd for RAM tier only. html.excludePathRegex: POSIX ERE patterns matched against URL.Path. Example: { "template": { "enabled": false }, "html": { "enabled": false, "memoryMaxMB": 64, "memoryCompress": false, "excludePathRegex": ["^/preview(/|$)"], "dbContent": { "policy": "flushAll" }, "doctreeContent": { "policy": "flushBySlug" } } }
